calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Diana Redding, Esq., for and with Lisa Wloch, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel reports as to the issues outlined in the Examiner's notes specifically those related to the bank statements and the retainer. Counsel reports that a Declaration to address the Examiner's notes and bank statements verified by the Executor have been filed. At the court's query, Counsel verifies that the printout of the bank statement was received in electronic form and printed without alteration. After additional discussion, the court waives defects and the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 25, 2023 is admitted to probate. Lisa Wloch is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 01, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.
